untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise pattern identification (AEDT—Ascending/Expanding pattern) based on visual chart structure with labeled points C, D, and H. This requires pattern recognition logic beyond available indicators. Specifically: (1) 'Correctly identify the pattern using Table 18.1 guidelines' cannot be expressed with price/technical indicators alone; (2) 'Ultimate low at point H' requires tracking pattern structure points not available in indicator set; (3) 'Avoid pullbacks' and 'nearby underlying support' require pattern-aware support/resistance logic. Substituted entry conditions (ADX for trend confirmation, price below SMA_50 for declining market) are approximate proxies only.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI pattern-based signal cannot be fully translated to rule-based indicators. Entry conditions approximate the 'bear market declining general market' requirement using trend confirmation (ADX_14 > 25) and bearish price action (close < SMA_50). Exit condition set to close above SMA_50 as typical mean reversion trigger. Average decline of 27% cited in source is descriptive, not actionable as entry condition. Stop placement is AUTHOR_SILENT; default 3% used. Pattern point H ('ultimate low') cannot be operationalized without explicit support level input or pattern recognition engine.
